clicks.delay_distribution_note: randint(100,200) — Scrapling Turnstile clicker uses random.randint(100,200) ms delay (L5.3)

_detection_notes: Scrapling automatic Turnstile solver. Pattern: detect challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v script, click at fixed coordinates with randint(100,200)ms delay (hardcoded in Scrapling source). Signatures: (1) single click within 100-200ms of page load; (2) zero mouse movement before click; (3) zero jitter; (4) no scroll/keyboard; (5) click x=960,y=540 is exact center of 1920x1080 viewport (viewport pinning L5.4).
